name: Pacific Alliance Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, CDs, mortgages, and commercial loans with online and mobile banking access.
description_long:
Pacific Alliance Bank is a traditional community bank that serves both personal and business customers through its website and physical locations. The institution is FDIC-insured and emphasizes security and government backing on its homepage. The bank operates with NMLS Number 1877390 and maintains an online presence at pacificalliancebank.com with a customer service line at (626) 773-8888.

Pacific Alliance Bank offers a comprehensive suite of deposit and loan products. For personal customers, they provide checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), individual retirement accounts, and mortgages with online application capabilities. Business customers can access business checking, business savings, business money market accounts, CDs, commercial loans, lines of credit, term loans, commercial real estate financing, construction loans, and SBA loans. The bank also offers payment processing services through Elavon for merchant customers.

The bank distinguishes itself through modern digital banking conveniences including mobile banking apps available on both iOS and Android platforms, online bill pay, mobile deposit, eStatements, Zelle integration, and real-time custom account notifications. They offer contactless debit cards and cashier's checks. Additional services include safe deposit boxes, direct deposit, night deposit, wires, remote deposit for business customers, and positive pay/check reconciliation services. The emphasis on digital accessibility while maintaining traditional banking services represents their positioning as a modern community bank.

Pacific Alliance Bank appears to be a legitimate, regulated financial institution with proper FDIC insurance and compliance documentation. However, the website provides limited detailed information about specific rates, fees, minimum balances, or product terms—customers must contact the bank directly or visit physical locations for rate quotes and detailed product information. As a community bank, they likely have more limited ATM networks compared to major national banks.
services: Commercial loans and lines of credit
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Comprehensive personal banking including checking, savings, IRAs, CDs, and mortgages
Full-service business banking with SBA loans, construction loans, and commercial real estate financing
Modern digital banking with mobile apps, mobile deposit, and real-time account alerts
Zelle integration for peer-to-peer money transfers
Contactless debit card technology for secure payments
Online mortgage application portal for convenience
cons: Limited geographic footprint—appears to serve primarily the Los Angeles area (626 area code location)
Website does not display current CD rates, APYs, or fee schedules; customers must call or visit in person
No information provided about minimum account balances or opening requirements
Likely smaller ATM network compared to national banks, limiting cash access convenience
Limited transparency on loan terms, rates, and qualification requirements on website

contact.address: 641 W Las Tunas Dr, San Gabriel, CA 91776

best_for: Small business owners seeking SBA loans, commercial real estate financing, and business checking/savings
Consumers in Southern California seeking FDIC-insured deposit accounts and mortgages from a community bank
Customers preferring in-person banking relationships combined with modern digital convenience
Business customers needing merchant payment processing through Elavon integration
diagnosis: Pacific Alliance Bank is best for small business owners and Southern California consumers who value FDIC insurance, community banking relationships, and modern digital convenience. The main caveat is that detailed product information, rates, and fees are not transparent on their website—prospective customers must contact them directly, and their geographic reach appears limited to the Los Angeles region.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 641 W Las Tunas Dr, San Gabriel, CA 91776
